manufacturing_process: Stamped rail reinforcement joined to side aperture and roof structure
primary_function: Maintain roof rail stiffness, side aperture dimensional stability, and roof load support
interfaces: A-pillar upper, B-pillar upper, roof bow, side outer, curtain airbag bracket
load_cases: Roof crush, door slam, body torsion, curtain airbag deployment, road durability
environmental_exposure: Moisture exposure near roof ditch, hem flange, and upper aperture interfaces
known_design_concerns: Dimensional variation, adhesive bond, corrosion at hem flange, NVH buzz squeak rattle, roof crush load path
assumptions: Synthetic demo data only. Final values require engineering review.
